resources.string: Hermes is running in the background

plurals.name: reconnect_notification_body_polling_interval
plurals.item: Pinging the server every %1$d second to stay alive.
Pinging the server every %1$d seconds to stay alive.

resources.string: Persistent troubleshooting capture for Hermes Android behavior
Capturing troubleshooting logs in the background. Tap Stop to end capture.
